Patch Set 2:

(1 comment)

There is a potential bug. If I am misunderstanding what is supposed to be happening there, let me know and I'll +1 this.

Patch Set 2: Code-Review-1

Well, sure and nice catch Michael, thanks! Hopefully this was harmless because ${#BUILT_MODULE_NAME[@]} or 0 was ok for this embryonic dkms.conf file ;-) But will fix that in next patch-set, mainly to avoid any confusion about a possible difference in the arrays index to be used.

parents.subject: LU-3531 doc: update lfs migrate and mkdir documentation.

commit.subject: LU-7679 build: strengthen lustre-dkms during on-target build
commit.message:
LU-7679 build: strengthen lustre-dkms during on-target build

This patch modifies internal scripts to strengthen
lustre[-client]-dkms package vs issues ([spl,zfs]-dkms not built,
configure errors, ...) that could be encountered during on-target
DKMS build step.

Signed-off-by: Bruno Faccini <bruno.faccini@intel.com>
Change-Id: I2dc8c91ff5874228dde0bc7995e45a6dcc6973d4
Reviewed-on: http://review.whamcloud.com/18167
Reviewed-by: Dmitry Eremin <dmitry.eremin@intel.com>
Tested-by: Jenkins
Reviewed-by: Michael MacDonald <michael.macdonald@intel.com>
Tested-by: Maloo <hpdd-maloo@intel.com>
Reviewed-by: Oleg Drokin <oleg.drokin@intel.com>
